title: Double Thick Chip Paint Brush, 3 inch / 75mm Wood Stain Brushes for Painting Walls and Fence Staining, Wooden Handle Masonry Paintbrush for Varnish, Paste, Gesso and Limewash
features: 【Big Chip Brushes】 3" inch (75mm) wide Paint Brush is perfect for furniture or fence varnishing and staining, big size allows for a wider stroke from small edges to large surface painting, and allows you to attain all of your decorating styles. It is specially used as a varnish brush, a masonry brush, a limewash brush or a paste brush. This disposable paint brush is economical and practical, also great for both interior and exterior painting works.

【Wide Practical Use】This 3in big Paint Brush for painting walls can work as fence paint brush, deck paint brush, decking paint brush, decking stain brush, deck stain brush, masonry paint brush, broad paint brush, furniture paint brush, house paint brush, wall paint brush, wood stain paint brush, staining brush, varnish paint brush, rough surface paint brush. This 3inch large paint brush is ideal for home Improvement and household DIY.

【All Paints and Stains】With soft synthetic bristles, our wood stain brush is suitable for all water based and oil based stains, paints and sealers, latex, polyurethane, resin, epoxy, fusion, emulsion, poly, gloss, lacquer, also gesso, glue, paste, lime, limewash, primer, plaster. Good choice for paint application on windows, doors, wooden fences, walls and ceilings. This staining brush is suitable for wall decorating, wood furniture varnishing.

【Premium Quality】Perfect shaped wooden handle surface was sanded very smooth for comfortable holding. High quality synthetic bristles mixed with solid round tapered nylon filaments are durable & long-lasting with amazing paints pick-up. Bristles are firmly steady in the ferrules by epoxy that no bristles lose off. Brush head was nailed onto the handle sturdily. With our stain paint brushes, you could create a prefect painting finish.

【Easy to Clean】It is easy to clean after every use, just remove wet paints or stains from brushes, wash and rinse the brushes with water or solvent according to different paints or emulsion, then hang them on a hook or rack for drip-dry, and put it in storage very conveniently, get ready for next use. Thus, our house paint brushes could be reused for multiple times, it is great value for your money.
description: Genixart Double Thick 3" Chip Brush, 75mm Flat Paint Brushes for Painting Staining Varnishing Materials: Synthetic Filaments Bristles Smooth Sanded Wood Handles Tin-plated Ferrules Handle Color: Plain Wood Features: Stain and Paste Wall Paint Brush No Lose Bristles, the bristles are steady firmly in the ferrules by epoxy Ideal for wall and furniture, also for metal or other material surfaces painting Perfect shaped wooden handle, surface smooth for comfortable holding Could be worked with most kinds of oil & water-based paints, stains, pastes, glue, gesso Excellent paint pick-up and release delivers a prefect finish Brush thinner tip to provide better cutting-in controls while painting and trimming A hole in handle allows hanging on a hook or rack easily for convenient storage One big size could meet your demand on different places painting Easy to Clean with water or paint solvent Could serve you for many time's uses and great value for your money Package Including: 1pc Chip Brush, 3"/75mm Tips: Please wash and rinse after use, hanging on a hook or rack for drip-dry. Get ready for next work.
